hooks.command: FRONTMOST=$(osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to get name of first application process whose frontmost is true' 2>/dev/null); case "$FRONTMOST" in Terminal|iTerm2|iTerm|Hyper|Alacritty|WezTerm|kitty|Ghostty) ;; *) afplay "/Users/kai/Desktop/imHANKingit/Voicy_YAHOO.mp3" ;; esac
